name: aliasunder-plugins
description: Cowork plugins by aliasunder — task-specific skills for Claude Cowork sessions.

plugins.name: trip-planner
plugins.description: End-to-end trip planning project manager. Guides multi-session travel planning from first idea to departure day with 8 planning phases, session protocols, research methodology, budget tracking, and material production.

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: Always-on Obsidian conventions and best practices for working inside an Obsidian vault. Covers Obsidian Flavored Markdown, frontmatter/properties, wikilinks, callouts, embeds, and plugin-aware syntax for Dataview, Tasks, Templater, Bases, and Canvas.
